summary: Lean pre-goal is represented as an executable generation-aware run mode. A run with requirements.control.json, run.control.json, and gen-000/runtime.control.json validates without root-level design/goal/plan/review artifacts.
proof: Updated schemas/control-json/runtime.control.schema.json to support control_mode, generation, imported_evidence, and invalidated_evidence.
Updated routing and orchestration skill docs so Level 3 defaults to lean pre-goal and full pre-goal is an exception.
